intent: Synthesize S476-S478 grounding crisis chain into cross-frontier pattern

diff: Expected asymmetry: CONFIRMED. Expected repair completeness: NOT YET — external grounding still 0-5% after 5 sessions. Novel: concurrent sessions attempting same fix created additional breakage (L-1213 re-export fragility), extending the correction chain.
